inbox.subject: Welcome to the Revenue Architect Platform
inbox.body:
Welcome!

Thank you for exploring the Revenue Architect platform. This system is designed to help you identify and fix the revenue leaks in your business.

Here's what you can do:

• Run the Revenue Journey Assessment (Calculator app)
• View your Dashboard (My Computer > C: Drive)
• Book a Strategy Call (AIM > Richard Norwood)
• Browse our Blog (Internet Explorer)

To get started, try opening the Calculator from the desktop.

Best,
Richard Norwood
Revenue Architect

inbox.subject: Your Revenue Journey Starts Here
inbox.body:
The 5-Stage Revenue Journey:

1. AWARENESS — Does your market know you exist?
2. ACQUISITION — Are they buying?
3. ACTIVATION — Do they come back?
4. REVENUE — Are you maximizing what comes in?
5. RETENTION — Is growth repeatable?

Most businesses are stuck at Stage 2 or 3 without knowing it. The Assessment Tool will tell you exactly where you are and what to fix first.

Run your assessment now: Open Calculator from the desktop.

inbox.subject: Re: Quick question about the 90-Day Partnership
inbox.body:
Great question!

The 90-Day Partnership is our done-with-you program where we:

• Map your complete Revenue Journey
• Identify your top 5 revenue leaks
• Build systems to plug each one
• Train your team to maintain them

It's not coaching. It's architecture. We build the systems together, and you own them forever.

Interested? Book a call: Open AIM and message me directly.

— Richard
